editOptions.title: Edit blueprint
editOptions.description: Change the existing values for this blueprint.

savingChanges.title: Saving changes
savingChanges.description: Please wait while your changes are being saved...

downloadingBlueprint.title: Downloading blueprint
downloadingBlueprint.description: Please wait while the blueprint is being downloaded...

uploadingBlueprint.title: Uploading crop
uploadingBlueprint.description: Please wait while the crop is being uploaded. This may take a minute...

cropMadeSuccessfully.title: Crop generated
cropMadeSuccessfully.description: The crop has been successfully created and is now available as a new blueprint within this project.

deleteBlueprint.title: Delete blueprint
deleteBlueprint.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the blueprint.

deletingBlueprint.title: Deleting blueprint
deletingBlueprint.description: Please wait while this blueprint is being deleted...

dialogCreateCrop.title: Creating crop
dialogCreateCrop.description: Complete the fields and upload your crop.

processingBlueprint.title: Processing blueprint...
processingBlueprint.description:
Your blueprint is being processed by AI.

You may continue using the application and will be notified once processing is complete.

deleteAreaDialog.title: Delete area "{{label}}"
deleteAreaDialog.description: You can undo this change later in the "Deleted areas" section below the blueprint image.

confirmSaveArea.title: Save generated areas?
confirmSaveArea.description: Do you want to save the areas generated by the AI? You can edit or delete them individually. These areas will replace any existing areas.

saveAreas.title: Saving areas...
saveAreas.description: Please wait while these areas are being saved...

selectAiModels.title: Select AI processing model
selectAiModels.description: Select the AI model that will be used to process the blueprint for each assigned specialty.

errorMessages.errorSavingChanges: An error occurred while saving changes. Please try again later.
errorMessages.errorDeletingBlueprint: An error occurred while deleting this blueprint. Please try again later.
errorMessages.noSpecialtiesSelected:
No specialties selected for this blueprint.
You need to edit all blueprint fields marked as "Unspecified" to use this functionality.

Required fields:
- Point of view
- Specialties
- Levels
errorMessages.noAiModelsForSpecialties: Sorry, there are no AI models available for the selected specialties.
errorMessages.needEditionForAi:
You need to edit all blueprint fields marked as "Unspecified" to use this functionality.

Required fields:
- Point of view
- Specialties
- Levels
errorMessages.noModelSelected: You must select a processing model for each specialty listed here.
errorMessages.processingFailed: AI processing failed. Please try again.
errorMessages.errorProcessingBlueprint: Something went wrong while processing the blueprint. Please try again later.
errorMessages.errorSavingAreas: An error occurred while saving areas. Please try again later.
errorMessages.noSpaceLeft: There is no space left to upload more blueprints. You can delete an existing blueprint to free up space for the new one.
